home.title: Credit Account Details
home.createLabel: Create a new Credit Account Details
home.createOrEditLabel: Create or edit a Credit Account Details

creditAccountDetails.created: A new Credit Account Details is created with identifier {{ param }}
creditAccountDetails.updated: A Credit Account Details is updated with identifier {{ param }}
creditAccountDetails.deleted: A Credit Account Details is deleted with identifier {{ param }}

delete.title: Cannot delete credit card details
delete.message: Credit card details cannot be deleted directly. These details are required for credit card accounts. To remove them, you must delete the financial account itself.

creditAccountDetails.creditLimitHelp: Maximum approved credit line for this card.
creditAccountDetails.statementDayHelp: Day of the month when the statement period closes.
creditAccountDetails.paymentDueDayHelp: Day of the month when payment is due.
creditAccountDetails.annualInterestRateHelp: Annual percentage interest rate. Used later for interest calculations.

composition.notConfigured: Credit card details have not been configured yet.
composition.saveError: The financial account was saved, but credit card details could not be saved. Please edit the account and try again.
